policy.label: Protection policy
policy.description: Global throttle, whitelist, and retention settings applied before the rule list.

rules.label: Rules
rules.description: Settings-backed rules evaluated in order before WordPress completes authentication.

attempts.label: Recent attempts
attempts.description: Read-only SQLite log of recent login attempts. IP addresses are stored as salted hashes.
attempts.blockSelectedDescription: This adds one enabled block rule per selected hashed IP.

lockouts.label: Active lockouts
lockouts.description: Current lockouts generated by blocking rules or throttling.
lockouts.unlockDescription: Selected lockouts will be removed from the runtime table.
